_publications._publicationTitle: Early Detection of Malignant and Premalignant Peripheral Nerve Tumors Using Cell-Free DNA Fragmentomics.

_contextSnippet: Our new participant cohort validates this finding comparing MPNST with PN (AUC = 0.73) and with healthy controls (AUC = 0.80). Tumor fraction also distinguished AN from MPNST (AUC = 0.75)
details: Distinguished MPNST from PN with AUC = 0.73 and from healthy controls with AUC = 0.80. Tumor fraction distinguished AN from MPNST with AUC = 0.75
